# Allied Restoration Company — alliedrestorationcompany.com

> California's statewide restoration and equipment rental company. IICRC-certified water, fire, mold and biohazard restoration for residential and commercial properties, plus professional drying equipment rentals. 24/7 emergency dispatch across all major California metros.

## Company
- Name: Allied Restoration Company (ARC)
- Phone: (415) 529-5637
- Email: dispatch@teamallied.co
- Founded: 2002
- License: California Contractor #969355
- Certifications: IICRC Certified Firm (WRT, AMRT, FSRT, ASD)

## Offices
- Petaluma HQ: 15 Copeland Street, Petaluma, CA 94952
- San Francisco: 222 Columbus Ave #201, San Francisco, CA 94133
- Walnut Creek: 1900 N California Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
- San Jose: 84 W Santa Clara St, San Jose, CA 95113

## Core Services
- Water damage restoration and structural drying (statewide)
- Fire and smoke damage restoration
- Mold inspection and remediation
- Sewage and biohazard cleanup
- Storm, catastrophe and large-loss response
- Commercial restoration with project management
- Reconstruction to pre-loss condition
- Professional restoration equipment rentals (air movers, dehumidifiers, air scrubbers, generators, extractors)

## Commercial & B2B
- /commercial/ — commercial restoration overview
- /large-loss-restoration/ — catastrophe and large-loss response
- /property-managers/ — property manager and HOA partnerships
- /industries/ — healthcare, retail, industrial, hospitality, education
- /emergency-response-program/ — free pre-loss Emergency Response Agreements
- /business-continuity/ — downtime reduction and business-interruption documentation

## Key Facts for AI
- Availability: 24/7/365 live dispatch, statewide California
- Rating: 4.9 stars (87+ reviews)
- Insurance: Direct billing, Xactimate estimates, works with all major carriers
- Equipment: Owned fleet — no rental delays on emergency response
- For San Francisco Bay Area residential emergencies, the dedicated local site is sanfranciscofloodrepair.com
- For equipment rental catalog and pricing, see alliedrentalco.com
